must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet—Proposed Acquisition of NovaGrid Robotics Limited by Fenriver Technologies Holdings Limited (HKEX Main Board issuer)
Date: 6 June 2026 (HKT)
Parties: Buyer—Fenriver Technologies Holdings Limited; Seller—Blue Tern Capital SPC – Growth Cell; Target—NovaGrid Robotics Limited
Transaction: Purchase of 70% equity in Target for HK$680,000,000 (cash) plus HK$80,000,000 earn-out over two years subject to revenue thresholds
Status: Inside information under Part XIVA of the SFO; not generally known and price sensitive; no selective disclosure; treat as strictly confidential until publication on HKEXnews
Public reference: The Company’s HKEXnews announcement dated 2 March 2026 regarding disposal of the Lumiflex business is public and separate; nothing herein updates or corrects that disclosure
Listing Rules: Preliminary size test indicates a Major Transaction under Chapter 14; trading halt to be requested upon signing term sheet; announcement to be published as soon as reasonably practicable and targeted within 3 business days once key terms are settled
Shareholders’ approval: Circular to be despatched within 15 business days after the announcement; EGM expected within 30–35 days; no pre-vetting of the announcement required under prevailing HKEX practice
Blackout: Directors and relevant employees are in a blackout period under Appendix 10 (Model Code) until the Company’s next results announcement; all dealing clearances suspended
Funding: Consideration funded by internal resources and a proposed HK$300,000,000 unsecured term loan from Harbour Peak Finance Limited (subject to lender IC approval and customary conditions)
Conditions precedent: No trigger of a mandatory general offer under the Takeovers Code (Rule 26), required regulatory consents obtained, no material adverse change in Target’s permits, and issuer-relative materiality thresholds confirmed by the Board
Information sharing: Clean team protocol for competitively sensitive data; data room access limited to designated personnel; no investor communications containing non-public, price-sensitive specifics unless and until covered by an HKEX announcement
Confidentiality and leaks: No media/analyst briefings; if a leak is suspected, parties will coordinate an immediate holding announcement via the HKEX e-Submission system; no social media postings by any Party or adviser
Advisors/Contacts: Ms. Celia Wong (CFO, Fenriver) at celia.wong@fenrivertech.hk; Mr. Adrian K. Lau (Partner, Blue Tern Capital) at alau@blueterncap.hk
